description: Style Note Comfort has never looked as good as with these brown cotton chinos from john players. That crisp smart edge is blended perfectly with a laid back demeanor to give you pure casual style. Pair these with a nice casual shirt for a summery, relaxed look. Product Details Brown trousers with plastic button fastening and metal zipper, two side pockets with one coin pocket and two buttoned pockets on the back Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold, inside out Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron on reverse Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
